message:
feat(freeze): add native dispatch infrastructure (disabled pending address-based lookup)

- Add native_dispatch.zig with hash table registry for frozen functions
- Add QuickJS patch to call frozen_dispatch_lookup from JS_CallInternal
- Remove all JS modifications from inject_hooks.js (just copies files now)
- Remove closure hook patching from runtime.zig build process
- Add frozen_dispatch_stub.c for CLI builds without frozen functions
- Fix duplicate name detection to check ALL functions, not just frozen ones

Native dispatch is currently disabled because name-based lookup causes
scope collisions - multiple functions with the same name in different
scopes all get intercepted by the same frozen version.

Next step: implement bytecode-address based dispatch instead of name-based.
